message:
test(e2e): Add social sharing and OpenGraph E2E tests

Add E2E tests for social sharing meta tags:
- OpenGraph meta tags on homepage and bundles listing page
- Twitter Card meta tags on homepage
- Page titles and meta descriptions
- Skipped tests for prompt/bundle detail pages (404 in dev mode)
